tasks.subject: Scaffold the-hive course project via gremlin CLI
tasks.description: Use `gremlin course init` to scaffold course-the-hive-multi-agent-orchestration in /Users/joel/Code/badass-courses/. Slug: the-hive-multi-agent-orchestration, title: "The Hive: Multi-Agent Orchestration"

tasks.subject: Wire gremlin-course-authoring infra (symlinks)
tasks.description: Symlink extensions/gremlin, skills/course-building, skills/course-architect, skills/course-outliner, skills/lesson-writer, skills/lesson-evaluator, skills/pdf-brain from gremlin-course-authoring into the course project's .pi/ directory

tasks.subject: Drop gist spec files into research/
tasks.description: Save all 8 gist files (00-OVERVIEW through 07-PATTERNS-STOLEN) into research/ as the raw source material for the course

tasks.subject: Seed lat.md knowledge graph from gist content
tasks.description: Populate lat.md/ with: source-material.md (gist summary + links), architecture.md (the 5-layer stack from 01-ARCHITECTURE), course-design.md (professional task, essential questions, outline stubs derived from the spec), build-log.md (initial entry)

tasks.subject: Write course ID.md and AGENTS.md
tasks.description: Create the instructional design doc (ID.md) with essential questions, professional task, design principles, and causal chain — following the pattern from course-the-claw. Write AGENTS.md with project-specific workflow instructions.

tasks.subject: Set up explorations workspace and first exploration stub
tasks.description: Create explorations/ as a bun workspace monorepo (matching the-claw pattern). Create first exploration stub: 2026-03-18-spawn-pi-visible-workers for the highest-leverage piece of the spec.
